prompt: A top-down cinematic still life of a vintage classified investigation dossier on a dark wooden desk, centered and filling most of the frame. Show a stack of 3 worn manila folders with aged beige paper, frayed corners, subtle stains, and realistic paper texture. The top folder is the main focus and is clipped at the upper left with 1 oversized silver paper clip. Across the top center, typewritten in bold black monospaced letters, the headline reads {argument name="headline text" default="CONFIDENTIAL – CASE FILES"}, with a thin horizontal rule beneath it. Add 2 red rubber-stamp marks: one near the top right that says "CONFIDENTIAL" at a slight angle, and one boxed stamp at the bottom right that says "HANDLING INSTRUCTIONS DO NOT COPY – DO NOT DISTRIBUTE". On the right edge of the folder stack, show 1 tabbed side label reading "CASE FILE NO." with a thick black redaction bar below it. The page is formatted like an old typewritten government document with crisp black ink, slightly uneven typewriter alignment, and many thick black redaction bars obscuring key details. Include 5 numbered sections exactly: "1. SUBJECT INFORMATION", "2. CASE SUMMARY", "3. DETAILS", "4. ASSOCIATES / CONTACTS", and "5. REMARKS". In the header area, include the fields "CASE FILE NO.:" with a black redaction bar, "DATE OPENED:" with {argument name="date opened" default="March 14, 20___"}, "PREPARED BY:" with a black redaction bar, "DEPARTMENT:" with {argument name="department" default="Internal Investigations Unit"}, and "CLASSIFICATION:" with {argument name="classification" default="CONFIDENTIAL"}. In section 1, include 6 fields: "NAME:", "ALIASES:", "DATE OF BIRTH:", "PLACE OF BIRTH:", "LAST KNOWN ADDRESS:", and "OCCUPATION:", each followed by black redaction bars of varying lengths. In section 2, add a short paragraph of typewritten case-summary text with 5 separate black redaction bars embedded in the sentence flow. In section 3, add a second paragraph of details text with 4 separate black redaction bars embedded in the paragraph. In section 4, include a 3-column table labeled "NAME", "RELATIONSHIP", and "NOTES", with 3 filled rows, each cell content covered by black redaction bars. In section 5, add a short warning sentence about sensitive information and unauthorized disclosure. Use warm sepia lighting, soft shadows around the folder edges, subtle vignetting, and a moody noir archival atmosphere. The image should feel realistic, tactile, secretive, and slightly dusty, like a confidential detective case file photographed for a crime thriller or worldbuilding prop.
translatedPrompt: 一张俯视视角的电影级静物照，展示了深色木桌上一份复古的机密调查档案，画面居中并占据大部分空间。展示一叠 3 个磨损的马尼拉文件夹，带有陈旧的米色纸张、磨损的边缘、细微的污渍和逼真的纸张纹理。最上方的文件夹是视觉焦点，左上角用 1 个超大号银色回形针固定。顶部中央用粗体黑色等宽字体打字显示标题 {argument name="headline text" default="CONFIDENTIAL – CASE FILES"}，下方有一条细水平线。添加 2 个红色橡胶印章标记：一个在右上角附近，略微倾斜地印着 "CONFIDENTIAL"；另一个在右下角的方框印章，印着 "HANDLING INSTRUCTIONS DO NOT COPY – DO NOT DISTRIBUTE"。在文件夹堆叠的右侧边缘，显示 1 个带标签的侧边栏，上面写着 "CASE FILE NO."，下方有一条粗黑色的涂改遮盖条。页面格式仿照旧式打字机打印的政府文件，带有清晰的黑色墨迹、略显不齐的打字机对齐方式，以及许多遮盖关键细节的粗黑色涂改条。准确包含 5 个编号部分："1. SUBJECT INFORMATION"、"2. CASE SUMMARY"、"3. DETAILS"、"4. ASSOCIATES / CONTACTS" 和 "5. REMARKS"。在页眉区域，包含以下字段："CASE FILE NO.:"（带黑色涂改条）、"DATE OPENED:"（后接 {argument name="date opened" default="March 14, 20___"}）、"PREPARED BY:"（带黑色涂改条）、"DEPARTMENT:"（后接 {argument name="department" default="Internal Investigations Unit"}）以及 "CLASSIFICATION:"（后接 {argument name="classification" default="CONFIDENTIAL"}）。在第 1 部分中，包含 6 个字段："NAME:"、"ALIASES:"、"DATE OF BIRTH:"、"PLACE OF BIRTH:"、"LAST KNOWN ADDRESS:" 和 "OCCUPATION:"，每个字段后均跟随长度不一的黑色涂改条。在第 2 部分中，添加一段简短的打字机风格案件摘要文本，并在句子流中嵌入 5 个独立的黑色涂改条。在第 3 部分中，添加第二段详细文本，并在段落中嵌入 4 个独立的黑色涂改条。在第 4 部分中，包含一个 3 列的表格，标签分别为 "NAME"、"RELATIONSHIP" 和 "NOTES"，共 3 行填充内容，每个单元格的内容均被黑色涂改条覆盖。在第 5 部分中，添加一句关于敏感信息和未经授权披露的简短警告。使用温暖的深褐色光线，文件夹边缘周围有柔和的阴影，带有细微的晕影，营造出一种忧郁的黑色电影档案氛围。图像应具有逼真、触感真实、神秘且略带灰尘的感觉，就像为犯罪惊悚片或世界观构建道具拍摄的机密侦探档案。

breakdown.creativeCore: 复古机密案件档案：此提示词可生成逼真的俯视视角黑色电影风格机密档案页面，非常适合用于叙事、侦探世界观构建以及电影级道具图像创作。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, top-down, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, vintage]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
